arts.ttl: Rotherham make Steve Evans decision after failing to match Birmingham City's pace
arts.sum: Rotherham United have parted ways with manager Steve Evans after they failed to live up to their pre-season billing of Birmingham City’s title rivals. A club statement reads: "Rotherham United can confirm that, following a meeting between the Chairman and Manager this morning, the club have parted company with First Team Manager Steve Evans together with Paul Raynor, Gary Mills and Ian Pledger, with immediate effect.
